name: Social Listening Dashboard
description: Social Listening Dashboard - Marketing template for research professionals
instructions: How to Use This Dashboard Getting Started Start with the Dashboard tab to see your key metrics at a glance. Track Mentions Add brand mentions in the Brand Mentions tab with date, platform, and content. Analyze Sentiment Use the Sentiment Analysis tab to understand how people are talking about your brand. Monitor Competition Track competitor activity in the Competitor Tracking tab. Manage Topics Organize discussions by topic in the Topic Tracker tab.
